title: Critic Review & Quality Assurance
description: Review the complete draft plan for internal consistency, omissions, unsupported claims, and logical errors in the analysis section. Specific review checklist: verify $12,000/month income target feasibility given known assets (with explicit SS sensitivity), check for RSU and Roth conversion timing conflicts in overlapping years, ensure Boeing pension gap is appropriately caveated throughout (not just mentioned once), validate that rental income assumptions are consistent across all sections ($2,400/month), confirm healthcare bridge costs are factored into income projections, verify gift/LTC premium cash flows don't create pre-retirement liquidity crisis, and check that all recommendations have supporting analysis (no unsupported claims).
